extensions.name: Base Integer Instruction Set
extensions.description: Loads/stores, integer ALU, branches, jumps — the mandatory base.

extensions.name: Single-Precision Floating-Point
extensions.description: 32-bit IEEE-754 float register file and ops.

extensions.name: Compressed Instructions
extensions.description: 16-bit encodings for common instructions to cut code size.

extensions.name: Instruction-Fetch Fence
extensions.description: fence.i to synchronize instruction and data streams.

extensions.name: General-purpose (IMAFD + Zicsr + Zifencei)
extensions.description: Shorthand for the common general-purpose ISA bundle.
